setting: オフィスでの昼休み、ダメ女に振り回される主人公と同僚の会話
lyrics:
Shut me out, but pull me close
Kinda loving it, give me your heartache
Hold me tight, but let me go
Kinda loving it, look what you started
Turn me on, then piss me off
Kinda loving it, got me addicted
Oh, you got me addicted

Oh, I don't mind
What you do, what you do, what you do with me, baby
I'm so down
Do whatever you want me to do
When you ask me

I don't care how many times you're breaking my heart
I'm just too weak to stay cool
Guess I'm a sucker for you
And I know it's complicated
But I hate being smart
So all the things that you do
Makes me a sucker for you
Guess I'm a sucker for you
Guess I'm a sucker for you

Making plans, don't show up
Baby, I don't mind, keeping me waiting
Every night, you're by my side
I know it's really worth every second

I don't wanna let go
I'm not gonna let go
Even if you hurt me, baby
So go ahead and hurt me, baby

Take me high to low, low
Get me hot and cold, cold
Go ahead and call me crazy
No, I'm not gonna leave you, baby

lyricsJa.en: Shut me out, but pull me close
lyricsJa.ja: 僕を拒絶したかと思えば、抱き寄せてくる

lyricsJa.en: Kinda loving it, give me your heartache
lyricsJa.ja: そんなのも悪くないな、君の抱える痛みを僕におくれ

lyricsJa.en: Hold me tight, but let me go
lyricsJa.ja: 強く抱きしめたかと思えば、突き放す

lyricsJa.en: Kinda loving it, look what you started
lyricsJa.ja: そんなのも嫌いじゃないよ、ほら、君が始めたことだろ

lyricsJa.en: Turn me on, then piss me off
lyricsJa.ja: その気にさせたかと思えば、またカチンと怒らせる

lyricsJa.en: Kinda loving it, got me addicted
lyricsJa.ja: うん、それも悪くない。すっかり君の依存症だ

lyricsJa.en: Oh, you got me addicted
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、完全に君の中毒になってる

lyricsJa.en: Oh, I don't mind
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、僕は気にしないよ

lyricsJa.en: What you do, what you do, what you do with me, baby
lyricsJa.ja: 君が僕に何をしようと、僕をどう扱おうとも

lyricsJa.en: I'm so down
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は君のなすがままだよ

lyricsJa.en: Do whatever you want me to do
lyricsJa.ja: 君が望むことは何でもするさ

lyricsJa.en: When you ask me
lyricsJa.ja: 君が僕に頼むならね

lyricsJa.en: I don't care how many times you're breaking my heart
lyricsJa.ja: 君が何度僕の心を砕こうと知ったことか

lyricsJa.en: I'm just too weak to stay cool
lyricsJa.ja: クールでい続けるには、僕は弱すぎるんだ

lyricsJa.en: Guess I'm a sucker for you
lyricsJa.ja: きっと僕は、君にゾッコンなんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I know it's complicated
lyricsJa.ja: 複雑な状況なのは分かってる

lyricsJa.en: But I hate being smart
lyricsJa.ja: でも、賢く立ち回るのなんてクソ食らえだ

lyricsJa.en: So all the things that you do
lyricsJa.ja: 君がするすべてのことが、僕を君の虜にするんだ

lyricsJa.en: Makes me a sucker for you
lyricsJa.ja: 本当に、僕は君にゾッコンらしくてさ

lyricsJa.en: Guess I'm a sucker for you
Guess I'm a sucker for you
Making plans, don't show up
lyricsJa.ja: 約束をしたのに、君は現れない

lyricsJa.en: Baby, I don't mind, keeping me waiting
lyricsJa.ja: ベイビー、気にしないよ。いくら僕を待たせたって

lyricsJa.en: Every night, you're by my side
lyricsJa.ja: 毎晩、君が僕のすぐそばにいる

lyricsJa.en: I know it's really worth every second
lyricsJa.ja: その1秒1秒に、どれだけの価値があるか分かっているから

lyricsJa.en: I don't wanna let go
lyricsJa.ja: 君を手放したくない

lyricsJa.en: I'm not gonna let go
lyricsJa.ja: 手放すつもりなんてないよ

lyricsJa.en: Even if you hurt me, baby
lyricsJa.ja: たとえ君が僕を傷つけたとしても

lyricsJa.en: So go ahead and hurt me, baby
lyricsJa.ja: だからいいよ、思う存分僕を傷つけてくれ

lyricsJa.en: Take me high to low, low
lyricsJa.ja: 天国からどん底まで突き落としてくれ

lyricsJa.en: Get me hot and cold, cold
lyricsJa.ja: 熱く燃え上がらせては、冷え切らせてくれ

lyricsJa.en: Go ahead and call me crazy
lyricsJa.ja: いいさ、僕をイカれてるって呼べばいい

lyricsJa.en: No, I'm not gonna leave you, baby
lyricsJa.ja: いや、それでも絶対に僕は君から離れないよ

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.japanese: 今日ひどい顔してるな。当てさせて…また彼女に待たされたのか？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: We were making plans, but she didn't show up.
sentences.displayHtml: We were making plans, but she didn't show up.

conversation.japanese: ああ。約束をしてたんだけど、彼女は来なかった。でも、正直気にしてないんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I don't care how many times she's breaking your heart, you need to wake up!
sentences.displayHtml: I don't care how many times she's breaking your heart, you need to wake up!

conversation.japanese: 冗談だろ？彼女が何度お前の心を砕こうと俺の知ったことじゃないが、目を覚ませよ！

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: But I hate being smart about these things.
sentences.displayHtml: But I hate being smart about these things.

conversation.japanese: ややこしい状況なのはわかってる。でも俺は、こういうことで賢く立ち回るのなんてクソ食らえなんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: She just likes to turn you on, then piss you off.
sentences.displayHtml: She just likes to turn you on, then piss you off.

conversation.japanese: 彼女はただ、お前をその気にさせては怒らせるのが好きなだけだ。遊ばれてるんだよ！

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Go ahead and call me crazy, but I'm staying with her.
sentences.displayHtml: Go ahead and call me crazy, but I'm staying with her.

sentences.text: Guess I'm just a sucker for her.
sentences.displayHtml: Guess I'm just a sucker for her.

conversation.japanese: いいさ、俺をイカれてるって呼べばいい。でも彼女とは別れない。どうやら完全に彼女にゾッコンみたいなんだよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Why do you even put up with it?
sentences.displayHtml: Why do you even put up with it?

conversation.japanese: 信じられないな。なんでそんな扱いに耐えられるんだよ？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Because when she is by my side, I know it's worth every second.
sentences.displayHtml: Because when she is by my side, I know it's worth every second.

conversation.japanese: なぜなら、彼女がそばにいてくれる時は、その一秒一秒に価値があるって分かっているからさ。
